attacking_style: Launches explosive, early attacks even from compromised positions, relying on raw power rather than tactical positioning to compensate for disadvantageous starting points.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns. Limited observations suggest team relies heavily on his individual presence rather than collective strategy.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data for definitive terrain preference, though explosive power suggests suitability for punchy, short efforts rather than sustained climbs.
vulnerability: Crash-prone, with single incident capable of collapsing team advantage; poor positioning discipline forces reliance on superior power to overcome tactical deficits.
key_patterns: Compensates for positioning errors with explosive power rather than improving tactical placement.
Team structure vulnerable to his individual misfortune, suggesting central role in collective efforts.
form_trajectory: unknown: observations too sparse and temporally separated (March to July 2023) to assess trajectory reliably
